nasb.text: Then Pilate *said to Him, “Do You not hear how many things they testify against You?”

esv.text: Then Pilate said to him, “Do you not hear how many things they testify against you?”

cnv.text: 彼拉多又問他：“他們作證指控你這麼多的事，你沒有聽見嗎？”

ccb.text: 彼拉多就问：“你没听见他们对你的诸多控告吗？”

csbs.text: 彼拉多对他说：“他们控告你这么多的事，你没有听见吗？”
